label: Wine, Cheese & Gastronomy
description:
World wine regions (AOC, DOC, DO, AVA etc.), grape varieties (Hornbostel-style taxonomy by color and region), world cheeses by country and type (PDO/AOC, milk type, texture), tasting terminology (terroir, appellation, vintage, tannin, finish, brettanomyces), and pairing principles (mariage, accord, regional pairing, acid-cuts-fat).

Import scripts: Wikidata wine appellations + châteaux/estates, Wikidata cheese types by country.

Atom IDs: wine:region:*, wine:varietal:*, wine:style:*, wine:appellation:*, wine:chateau:*, cheese:*, tasting:*, pairing:*
attribution: Wikidata | EU DOOR PDO/PGI register | Wine Institute
